title: Custom Food Attributes
description: Configure nutrition, saturation, eating time and whether or not always edible of every food.
body:
This mod lets you configure the nutrition, saturation, eating time and whether it should be always edible of every food.

# Features
You can configure the following things of every food individually:
- ![nutrition icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ebe0adbfa1105ec156576e720aafc6a07c529a.png) nutrition
- ![saturation icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b83a6daaf9433858053aa5d2e1b358261709238.png) saturation
- ![eating time icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf5df66547a43f10b6f9918ef0b1f73e0b85fe9.png) eating time
- ![always edible icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/658b7f42ec5a8babbacbdc20547176a0c2c23402.png) always edible

### What makes this mod special
- Everything can be configured seperately
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) Support
- Full support for every listed minecraft version including updates to newly released versions

### Configuration
- Configuration is applied in-game (no need to restart your game or to rejoin your world)
- Super lightweight due to the attributes only changing at the start of the game or if a value gets changed

### Mod Food
<details>
<summary>Currently this mod supports these other mods and their food</summary>

- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/project/gc8OEnCC)
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/project/MpzVLzy5)

</details>

If you want a mod to be added to this list please tell me on my discord or on github.

# Dependencies
This mod requires the following other mods as dependencies:

### Fabric
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

Although it is not required, [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is highly recommended.

# Support
If you have questions, encounter problems, find bugs or have suggestions you can join my discord server:

[![Fneifnox's Mods Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65d0cb3b474c0517d6d0e11b8f77c2276edf08f.png)](https://discord.gg/bszSDCq5ms)
